auth_notes: Requires an API Key generated from the administrative dashboard. Most requests require a 'Practice-ID' header in addition to the authorization token.
rate_limits: Typically 60 requests per minute per practice ID.
gotchas: Strict HIPAA compliance requirements mean data logging in n8n should be disabled for sensitive fields.
Timezone offsets are often returned as strings rather than ISO-8601, requiring manual parsing in a Function node.
Webhooks must be manually registered via an API call as there is no UI for webhook management.
research_notes: Integration must be built using the HTTP Request node. Because the API returns nested JSON for doctor availability, a 'Split Out' node or 'Item Lists' node will be necessary to process individual time slots. Webhook implementation requires a manual POST request to their /subscriptions endpoint to point to the n8n Webhook URL.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration must be built using the HTTP Request node. Because the API returns nested JSON for doctor availability, a 'Split Out' node or 'Item Lists' node will be necessary to process individual time slots. Webhook implementation requires a manual POST request to their /subscriptions endpoint to point to the n8n Webhook URL.
